author: SantiMod
content:
Here's another Shipmas surprise! 

Everyone holding a ReBirth/ Legends meta-poster or a piece from the FIRMAM3NTAL collection now has a shiny new Star Atlas NFT in their wallet! 

 See the patch featuring Blondish & Abracadabra: 
https://play.staratlas.com/market/Ap5BX33uJcnAfpHPtfMQodJv7B5q1fcUfe5skjqBMRBR
